refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is overcrowded with patients and medical staff. There are many people standing or sitting in close proximity to each other.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see the waiting room packed with people. It was difficult to find a seat and the atmosphere was uncomfortable. The overcrowding made me anxious about my health and safety.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, it's really uncomfortable. I'm worried about getting sick with all these people around me
